content.passage: Good afternoon, folks, and welcome back to Nashville Traffic Watch! We've got some traffic on the main highway due to construction, causing delays of about 30 minutes during busy times. Consider taking Maple Street, Oak Avenue, or Pine Road as alternate routes. Stay tuned for more updates on your route!

Welcome to the Hawaiian Banana Plantation! I'm Kai Mahelona, and I'll be your guide throughout the tour today. During our time together, you'll walk through the banana fields, see how they are grown, and have the chance to pick your own Hawaiian Apple Bananas. Let's dive into this tropical adventure!

Question 7: Hello, one of my friends was telling me about your August event calendar. I'm calling to learn a little more about the events you're having. What is the date of the lecture about early farming practices? And what time does it start?

Question 8: I'm really excited about the Food History Festival on August 27th. That starts at 11 o'clock in the morning, right?

Question 9: Events that take place in the morning are especially convenient for me. Can you give me all the details about the events that take place in the morning?

Question 7: Hi, I'm attending our law firm's annual retreat, but I lost my schedule. I'm hoping you can answer some of my questions. When is the dinner and who is giving the closing remarks?

Question 8: I need to make a phone call at 2 o'clock. Will that be a problem?

Question 9: I'm really looking forward to participating in some competitions. Can you give me all the details of the competitions that are scheduled?

Question 7: Hi, I heard about your rafting trips and I'd like to get some information. Where are you located and at what months do you have rafting trips?

Question 8: I don't own any rafting equipment. Do I need to buy any to go on one of your rafting trips?

Question 9: My son has never been rafting before. Can you give me all the details of any trips that are appropriate for a beginner?

Question 7: Hi, this is Brad Peterson. I'm visiting Oak Hedge in a few weeks, and I'd like more information about your company's tours. I heard that your old town walking tour is great. Can you tell me how long that tour is and how much it costs?

Question 8: There are four people in my group. We can get a discount because we have four people, right?

Question 9: I'm particularly interested in your bus tours. Could you give me all of the details of any bus tours you offer?

Question 7: Hi, I'm attending the corporate retreat this week, but I left the schedule in my office. I was hoping you could give me some information. Can you tell me what time the first event starts and what the topic is?

Question 8: Someone in my department said that I need to bring my own lunch. Is that right?

Question 9: I believe the schedule said that there are going to be some workshops. Can you give me all the details about any workshops at the retreat?

Question 7: Hi, I like to attend events at your community center, but I don't think I received a copy of the October schedule. I'm hoping you can answer my questions. I really like your monthly folk music event. On what date will folk music night take place in October and what time will it start?

Question 8: I heard you're having a poetry competition this month. If I want to participate, I can just sign up when I arrive that night, right?

Question 9: My friend is coming to visit at the beginning of the month, and I'd like to bring him to some events while he's here. Can you give me all the details of any events taking place before October 10th?

Question 7: Hello, I know you're working on the schedule for the monthly staff meeting and I have some questions for you. What is the date of the meeting and where will it be held?

Question 8: I know we have some new staff members that will be introduced at this meeting. Mary Irwin will be making those introductions, right?

Question 9: A colleague said she might need my help preparing for the meeting. Could you give me all the details of sessions that she will be leading?

Question 7: Hello, I'm interviewing applicants tomorrow for our Student Internship Program, but I forgot the schedule on my desk and I was hoping you could take a look at it for me. Where will the interviews be held and what time is the first one?

Question 8: I know we've had some good interns from Boulder University in the past. We don't have any applicants from Boulder, do we?

Question 9: I'm particularly interested in getting good interns for the art department. Can you give me all the details about the interviews with applicants applying to work in the art department?

Question 7: Hi, I'm interested in taking a group exercise class, and I'm hoping you can give me some information. How much does it cost to take a class?

Question 8: I'm interested in the water exercise class. That's on Wednesdays, right?

Question 9: I heard you offer a dance for fitness class. Could you give me all the details about any dance for fitness classes you'll be offering?

Question 7: Hi there. I'm interested in attending the Leadership Conference this April, but I can't find any details about the agenda online. I hope you can answer some of my questions. What are the dates of the conference and where is it being held?

Question 8: If I can only attend one day of the conference, do I still have to pay for the full conference?

Question 9: Pedro Marquez is a good friend of mine, so I'd like to attend as many of his sessions as I can. Can you give me all the details about the sessions Pedro will be leading?

content.passage: Today on Smart Cooking, I'll teach you how to make pasta salad, which is my favorite summertime lunch dish. The ingredients you'll need include one box of pasta, a variety of vegetables, and olive oil. After a commercial break, we will begin by cooking the pasta.

Woodhaven Car Wash has been serving the Franklin area for over forty years. Our full exterior service includes handwashing, waxing, and tire cleaning. We also offer several options for cleaning your car's interior. While we work on your vehicle, you can enjoy coffee or tea in our comfortable waiting area. And remember, we're open late for your convenience! For detailed information regarding course content and schedules, please visit our Web site.

content.passage: Good morning, and welcome to Weather Watch. I'm your host, Diana Santos. After weeks of warm, sunny weather, a major weather event is approaching. A large storm moving in from the northwest is expected to bring heavy rain and high winds to our area tonight. Residents should prepare for possible power outages. And for those of you planning outdoor events this weekend, you may want to make alternate plans.

Hello, this message is for Kevin Cho. This is Grace Patel calling from Akins Computer School. You recently contacted us about our evening computer classes. I wanted to let you know that our new schedule is now available on our website. We've added several new courses this semester, including web design and data analysis. Please visit our website or call us back at this number if you would like to register or need more information.

Are you looking for accommodations in Stanton Beach for your summer vacation? During the months of June, July, and August, hotel prices can be extremely high. But Bondwell Rentals offers furnished houses and apartments for large groups at very reasonable prices. And all of our properties are just steps away from the ocean. To learn more, contact our office today!

In weather news this week, the Cooperstown area is going to get significantly cooler. After having such a hot and humid August, it will be a nice change to see some lower temperatures. Expect cool breezes, cloudy skies, and occasional rain showers.

content.passage: On Monday, May 7, we will start installing new telephone lines in most of your offices. Unfortunately, you won't be able to use your telephones until the work is completed later in the week. This will affect your work on Monday, Tuesday, and Wednesday morning However, you can use the telephones in the main reception area during that time.

All right everyone, we've come to the end of our tour of the downtown area, and we're about to enter the public gardens, where we'll take a short break. There's a café here, where you can rest, get something to drink, and look over the schedule for the rest of the day. Let me know if you have any questions.

content.passage: Attention, all staff! I am pleased to announce that the construction of our indoor fitness facility is finally finished. The new gym is located on the fifth floor in the main building. Anyone who would like to have the benefit of using it is free to do so any time since it will be open every day, 24 hours a day. Administrative assistants in each department will help you upgrade your current identification card or have a new one issued.

It's my pleasure to welcome everyone to the coolest sightseeing in Manhattan. As you probably have already read in the catalog, Manhattan is famous for its many distinct skyscrapers, not to mention dazzling neon signs at night. I recommend you bring a video camera and record the many precious moments of your trip. The weather is cooperating with a gentle wind from the ocean, and we will see live performances by the street artists who live in the western district of Manhattan, called Little Argentina. As you might have noticed, we changed today's itinerary. You are all invited to a complimentary dinner buffet to celebrate this hotel's 20th anniversary.

Of all the locations we've seen so far, I strongly advise that you select this sandwich shop and convert it to your new Italian restaurant. The store has a friendly, comfortable, cozy, and welcoming atmosphere. The interior decorations are so spotlessly clean and elegant that you might even want to keep everything as it is. The rent is quite reasonable, considering its priceless location right in the heart of downtown. Why don't we take a closer look at this immaculate store while we have lunch here? Let's first find a parking space.

Why don’t you treat yourself to a holiday at the Hotel Hampton in Virginia? For just $225 per person, you can fly to sunny Virginia and enjoy a wonderful 3-night stay. The Hotel Hampton is a 5-star resort with great facilities including a swimming pool, a gymnasium, a business center and an 18-hole golf course. This promotion is only available for a limited time, so you’d better reserve your place today! The number to call is 605-0317 or you can visit www.hamptonhotel.com for more information.

Good afternoon, everyone and welcome to the Chinatown historic district. My name is George and I’ll be your guide today. The district was first founded by Cantonese immigrants around 1920. Later, however, it received immigrants from many other countries looking for work. During the tour, you’re allowed to take pictures. We will see many fine examples of Chinese architecture, and many Chinese restaurants and grocery stores. We will also see a Greek church and a Turkish mosque. Now let’s start our tour.

At the company’s anniversary dinner, you will all be sitting with your departments. Company shuttle buses will be available at the main entrance at 5 P.M. For those of you who will not take the shuttle bus, a map with directions will be posted in the lobby and also on the third, ninth, and twelfth floors. Remember, everyone is required to attend this ceremony. If for some reason you are unable to attend, please contact the HR department and state your reason.

Rock Radio is proud to present an hour-long interview with Collin Taylor, world famous singer and song writer. The interview will be broadcast live on Rock Radio, 98.7, on March 18th at 7 P.M. We’ll discuss the music industry, Mr. Taylor early career, and his latest album. After the interview, Mr. Taylor will be answering questions from listeners who call in. You won’t want to miss this one. 7 P.M., March 18th, on Rock Radio.

Hello, you have reached the Customer Service Department at Neo Industries Incorporated. Our customer service center is temporarily unavailable due to technical difficulties with our computer system. We are currently working in the problem, and we hope to have the system up and running again within the hour. If you’re calling to find out about your order status, our new products, or any other information, please visit our website and click on the appropriate link. We apologize for any inconvenience, and thank you for calling Neo Industries Incorporated.

Are you interested in losing weight but don’t want to spend all of your valuable time stuck inside a gym? Fortunately, Hard Line Fitness is now accepting new members for discounted rates. If you and a friend register for a six-month membership within the next five weeks you will only have to pay 50% of the regular membership fee. Hard Line Fitness has expert trainers who are fit, enthusiastic and friendly, and our fitness equipment is top-of-the-line. Call now to get more information about us at 1-800-988-3355

This is Marilyn Smith from Pacific Flight 55. Regrettably, I need to report some unfortunate news. Due to treacherous weather, the connecting flight will be delayed until after midnight. I have been informed that a hurricane will pass through this area. On behalf of Pacific Air, I would like to offer everyone on the connecting flight food vouchers that can be used at all of the restaurants in the terminal.

Hello. I am glad to welcome you to the 20th Annual World Conference on Intellectual Property Protection. I am Dr. Fergus Parry. When I was offered the opportunity to address the important question of how to prevent illegal copying, I realized that we have reached the point where we should definitely do something to crack down hard on unauthorized use. We will discuss this issue and gather ideas to take the appropriate measures. So please participate actively in as many seminars as you can.

This is Charles Loffman from the ACF Weather Network. It's a bit cold today, but the temperature will begin to be moderate this afternoon with light winds. A weak disturbance passing to the south will deliver increasing clouds this afternoon along with a chance of a few flurries. Please be sure to bring a hat when you go out. Skies will gradually clear overnight. Stay with us. Coming up next is sports.

The Madeleine Hotel is proud to announce the completion of its new Convention Center. With advanced audio-visual equipment, dining facilities, and plenty of space, it’s the perfect location for any corporate event. To reserve the Madeleine Hotel Convention Center, simply call one of our friendly customer service agents at 1-800-555-9973. You can also arrange a tour of the facilities with the centre manager, Jennifer. Call today!

Don't settle for just any old dinner. We can help guide you to the best restaurants near our Chincoteague /ʃɪŋkəˈti:g/ hotel. With the Atlantic Ocean at Chincoteague's back door, it's no wonder that seafood abounds in the local fare. Chincoteague Island has long been renowned for its fresh, local seafood - especially Tom's Cove Clams and Oysters. In Chincoteague, seafood goes straight from the local waters to your plate. You can't get it any fresher than that!

Ladies and gentlemen, this is Christine and I’m your chief flight attendant. Welcome aboard British Airways bound for Florence. We are here to make sure you have a relaxed, comfortable, and enjoyable flight. Our flight time will be of approximately 3 hours and 15 minutes. We will be flying at an altitude of 30.000 feet. Your portable electronic devices must be set to ‘airplane’ mode until an announcement is made upon arrival. Now, we will be showing you a safety video so please give us your full attention. Thank you.

Let’s look at the weather. Temperatures have gone down lower than we expect at this time of year, and today it’ll snow in most places. Eastern areas will see particularly heavy snow. Many schools and offices have announced closings due to the weather and public transportation is experiencing cancellations. Government officials recommend that residents not travel far away from home. Keep you updated by listening for more announcements throughout the day.

Good evening, ladies and gentlemen. We are all here to thank one of our most valued employees, Mike Smith, our Regional Marketing Manager in Hong Kong, who is retiring next month. As you may all know, Mike was your first Regional Marketing Rep. Thanks to Mike, we have had excellent sales in Hong Kong and extended our wide network of regional sales offices around East Asia. And now we want to sincerely thank Mike for his 35 years of service and for all his contribution to overseas sales, which have become a central part of our business today.
